candidates.name: distinguishable_state_or_configuration
candidates.rationale: Present in all positives and multiple contrast systems; too generic to discriminate reasoning.

candidates.name: commitment_sensitive_state
candidates.rationale: Removing it does not destroy registered discrimination; equivalent commitment structure is reconstructible from other licensed roles.

candidates.name: stakes_questions_or_live_alternatives
candidates.rationale: Useful but replaceable by an equivalent objective-plus-transformation formulation.

candidates.name: grounds_constraints_or_dependency
candidates.rationale: Reconstructible from admissibility and auditable entitlement dependencies.

candidates.name: admissibility_beyond_arbitrary_transition
candidates.rationale: Reconstructible as a constraint over grounds, transformations, and entitlement traces.

candidates.name: consequence_sensitive_update
candidates.rationale: Reconstructible from alternatives, admissibility, and before/after dependency structure.

candidates.name: history_or_path_dependence
candidates.rationale: Reason-giving history is reconstructible; bare path dependence also appears in contrasts.

candidates.name: representation_denotation_separation
candidates.rationale: Depends on architecture and is not required in every source-native encoding.

candidates.name: semantic_interpretation
candidates.rationale: Present outside reasoning and depends on semantic granularity.

candidates.name: investigation_objective_or_problem_relativization
candidates.rationale: Objectives and tasks occur in nonreasoning systems.

candidates.name: calculus_or_equivalent_transition_constraint
candidates.rationale: Transition constraints occur in arbitrary machines and workflows.

candidates.name: provenance_or_entitlement_structure
candidates.rationale: Reconstructible from grounds, admissibility, and history dependencies.

independence.interpretation: Deterministic and auditable but internal, non-blind, finite-corpus.

method.ablation: remove the candidate's registered role contribution and recompute the frozen discriminator
method.candidate_presence: evaluated from frozen criterion profiles plus candidate-specific representation notes
method.classification_rule: coverage, representation transport, destructive ablation, reconstruction, and equivalent reintroduction; recurrence alone is never sufficient
method.equivalent_reintroduction: a reconstruction counts as failure of ablation when it restores the same commitment under another name
method.positive_and_contrast_scope: all 8 positive and 8 contrast records; disputed records reported separately
method.reconstruction: attempt an explicit alternative formulation from remaining licensed roles

nonclaims: the finite corpus represents all reasoning
